examples: You can dazzle members of the opposite with your quick wit and aggressive charm.
At the time, it was only an educated guess that this so-called dazzle camouflage would work.
Even meteorites less graceful in external appearance can dazzle when sliced open like a grapefruit.
Bags, pouches, tubes--how do you dazzle someone at a cocktail party talking about "flexible packaging"?
